items.title: TSMC says tariffs have some impact but AI demand robust
items.description: U.S. tariffs are having some impact but demand for artificial intelligence remains strong and continues to outpace supply, the chief executive of Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC said on Tuesday. ...

items.title: S&P 500's breakout May was largely a result of Mag 7 gains
items.description: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) clocked its best month of trading in May since 1990, and the majority of the Magnificent Seven — comprised of tech stocks Meta Platforms (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Alphabet (GOOGL, GOOG), Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Nvidia (NVDA), Tesla (TSLA) — may be deserving of some of the credit. Yahoo Finance host Julie Hyman recaps the Mag 7 stock gains and how it contributed to the S&P 500's breakout May. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

items.title: Apple Appeals EU's Interoperability Mandate
items.description: Apple warns DMA compatibility requirements will erode seamless user experience

items.title: The Magnificent Seven Stocks Staged a Blistering May Rally. What's Next?
items.description: The Magnificent Seven gained more than 13% last month, making the group of big tech stocks one of the best-performing corners of financial markets in May.

items.title: Apple Stock Has ‘Significant,’ Long-Term Opportunities. The Case for Buying Now.
items.description: BofA Securities analyst Wamsi Mohan sees a ‘significant,’ long term opportunity for Apple investors.
